name: New Potatoes Country Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the potatoes in salted water until tender. Leave the skins on; they can be peeled once around the center.
2. In a saucepan over low heat, melt the margarine. Stir in the flour, salt, and pepper. Slowly stir in the water. Continue cooking until thickened.
3. Add the lemon juice to the sauce.
4. Place the potatoes in a casserole dish. Pour the prepared sauce over them (this step can be done ahead of time).
5. Bake at 325°F for 20 minutes.
6. Top with crumbled bacon and generously sprinkle with dill weed and parsley before serving.
7. Serves 6.
